name: Interxion Holding N.V.
description: Interxion Holding N.V. is a leading provider of carrier and cloud-neutral colocation data center services in Europe. The company supports a wide range of customers, including enterprises, system integrators, cloud service providers, and financial institutions, by offering secure, reliable, and highly connected data center environments. Interxion's state-of-the-art facilities enable customers to connect with a vast ecosystem of connectivity providers and platforms, facilitating seamless digital transformation and IT infrastructure management.
